cases.description: Two matching copies reach quorum and commit exactly once.
One inaccessible copy does not block a two-copy quorum.
A single available copy cannot satisfy a two-copy restore quorum.
Matching epochs with divergent state fail closed.
Available copies from different epochs cannot form one restore set.
A quorum below the durable current epoch is rejected.
An invalid manifest cannot count toward quorum.
Verification may stage a matching quorum without committing state.
An interruption before the commit marker leaves canonical state unchanged.
A durable commit marker allows deterministic recovery after acknowledgment loss.
A retry referencing the committed restore remains idempotent.
Copies from a different repository are rejected.
Copies from a different lifecycle profile are rejected.
A committed restore preserves revoked authority generations.
A committed restore preserves suspended authority generations.
No unavailable copy may contribute to quorum.
A requested copy identifier absent from the backup set fails closed.
